name: Abacus
description: Counting-frame rods with lacquered beads mid-calculation — every redraw slides the beads into a new total.

code.style: --rail: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color3)); --rule: ( /* three beads share one emitted lacquer and ride the same rail */ --bead: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --bs: calc(@r(140, 200) * 1px / @Y); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -1%; width: 102%; top: 47%; height: calc(34px / @Y); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--rail); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 17%; left: @rand(2%, 36%); top: 41.5%; border-radius: 40%; background: @var(--bead); box-shadow: @var(--bs) 0 @var(--bead), calc(@var(--bs) * 2) 0 @var(--bead); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
